name: chain_ph_launch_gentlelimit_mindful_screen_
method: [PH LAUNCH] GentleLimit: Mindful screen time for macOS without blocking apps

stages.task: playwright scrape producthunt.com/posts/gentlelimit — extract: upvoter count, top comments with user handles, maker Twitter, pricing tier, app description
classify commenters: MAKER (competitor), USER (our customer), INVESTOR (ignore). Extract pain points: 'too restrictive', 'just want awareness', 'macOS only'. Score each for outbound fit.
spin up screen-time-awareness PWA using app_factory_autopilot.py — differentiate on: cross-platform (web), free tier, no download required, gentle nudges not blocks
route USER-classified leads to cold email pipeline. Message angle: 'saw you liked GentleLimit — built a web version that works on any device without install'
